pillars.label: Sentiment Dynamics
pillars.description: Direction and acceleration of news tone and media attention (GDELT).

pillars.label: Transition Readiness
pillars.description: Capital-allocation and credit-market evidence of transition investment.

pillars.label: Governance Credibility
pillars.description: Governance quality, controversy exposure and pillar balance.

pillars.label: Disclosure Behavior
pillars.description: Frequency and recency of sustainability disclosures (SGX/Bursa).

pillars.label: Data Coverage
pillars.description: Share of candidate variables observed for this company (display only — not part of the weighted score).

flags.label: Low coverage
flags.tooltip: Fewer than 50% of candidate variables observed; score confidence interval widens accordingly.

flags.label: Controversy
flags.tooltip: Elevated Sustainalytics controversy level (>= 3 of 5) at the latest snapshot.

flags.label: Low liquidity
flags.tooltip: Median daily dollar volume below the backtest liquidity floor; scored but excluded from backtest portfolios.

flags.label: High volatility
flags.tooltip: Trailing 12m return volatility in the top decile of the universe.

flags.label: Stale data
flags.tooltip: No sentiment observation within the last 60 days.
